<!--
Before opening a question:

1. Search the docs — https://github.com/dirghaai/dirgha-code/tree/main/docs
2. Search existing Discussions — https://github.com/dirghaai/dirgha-code/discussions
3. If neither helps, prefer opening a Discussion over an issue.

Issues are for actionable work. Questions often fit better in Discussions
where the answer compounds for the next person who asks the same thing.
-->

## What's happening instead

<!-- The actual behavior or blocker. -->
